DECLARATION OF ALI A AALAEI IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR TERMINATING, EVIDENTIARY, ISSUE, AND MONETARY SANCTIONS FOR VIOLATION OF THE COURT'S OCT 17, 2016 ORDER (TRANSACTION ID # 59933787) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERIES GROUP, LLC A NEVADA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF SERIES GROUP, LLC'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING EVIDENTIARY ISSUE AND MONETARY SANCTIONS FOR VIOLATION OF THE COURT OCT 17, 2016 ORDER IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS. DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE AND INSPECTION DEMANDS, SET ONE WITHIN 10 DAYS. EVIDENTIARY SANCTIONS ARE ISSUED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS ARE PRECLUDED FROM OFFERING ANY WRITINGS OR INFORMATION REQUESTED BY PLAINTIFF IN FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE AND INSPECTION DEMANDS, SET ONE AS EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF THEIR CASE AT TRIAL AND/OR AT A PROVE UP HEARING FOR DAMAGES IF A DEFAULT IS ENTERED. IF DEFENDANTS FAIL TO SERVE CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE AND INSPECTION DEMANDS, SET ONE WITHIN 10 DAYS, THEN DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANTS SHALL PAY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000 TO PLAINTIFF. PREVAILING PARTY PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM THOMAS COHEN, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED. (D302)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-27-2016 Set For Trial On Jun-05-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Evidentiary Issue And Monetary Sanctions For Violation Of The Court Oct 17, 2016 Order
Off Calendar Jan-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Ali Aalaei of Ari Law Firm P.C. (415)357-3600 appeared for plaintiff. / Atty. Russell Robinson of Law Offices of Russell Robinson (415)861-4416 appeared for defendant.

Argued - The Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF SERIES GROUP, LLC's Motion For Terminating Evidentiary Issue And Monetary Sanctions For Violation Of The Court Oct 17, 2016 Order is granted as follows. Defendant shall serve code compliant responses without objections to Form Interrogatories, Set One and Inspection Demands, Set One within 10 days. Evidentiary sanctions are issued as follows: Defendants are precluded from offering any writings or information requested by Plaintiff in Form Interrogatories, Set One and Inspection Demands, Set One as evidence in support of their case at trial and/or at a prove up hearing for damages if a default is entered. If Defendants fail to serve code compliant responses without objections to Form Interrogatories, Set One and Inspection Demands, Set One within 10 days, then default shall be entered against Defendants. Defendants shall pay sanctions in the amount of $2,000 to Plaintiff. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Pro Tem Thomas Cohen, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2016 Set For Trial On May-01-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-26-2016 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Inspection Demands
Off Calendar Oct-17-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Craig P. Ramsdell of Ari Law Firm, P.C. Tel: (415) 357 3600 appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.

RUILING:

There being no opposition nor an objection PLAINTIFF SERIES GROUP, LLC A NEVADA LIMITED LIABILITY'S Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Inspection Demands is heard this day. The Court adopts its Tentative Ruling. The Court grants Motion to Compel and orders Defendants to provide substantive responses to Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories, Set One, and Inspection Demands, Set One, on or before November 11, 2016.
The Court orders Defendants to produce to Plalintiff all documents responsive to Plaintiff's Inspection Demands, Set One, on or before November 11, 2016.
The Court imposes sanctions against Defendats and their counsel in the amount of $1,500.00 to be paid on or before November 11, 2016. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Mark J. Lehocky; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (302)
